final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a WeChat article cover featuring the launch of "染秋" fragrance.

Style/medium: premium editorial design, high-end luxury aesthetic with refined typography
Composition: centered layout, title as focal point, balanced negative space around edges
Subject: elegant Chinese title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as dominant visual element
Scene/backdrop: minimalist abstract autumn atmosphere, subtle gradient suggesting warmth and fragrance
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, sophisticated and calm mood evoking autumn elegance
Color palette: warm amber and golden tones as base, deep burgundy or bronze accents, cream white for breathing space
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be largest element; design must remain legible at 900x500px thumbnail size; no busy backgrounds
Avoid: stock photography clichés, generic autumn leaves, watermarks, cluttered layouts, low contrast text on background
